ipv4-default.description: Legacy IPv4 examples continue to compile and build without requiring any new control-plane capability.

ipv6-core.description: Repository-level IPv6 readiness is tracked here, but this integration branch does not yet carry the IPv6 readiness examples or runtime probes.
ipv6-core.notes: Do not mark IPv6 as covered on this branch until the IPv6 readiness work is merged into this integration line.

routing-bird-frr.description: Router-selected BIRD/FRR backends are rendered by Routing from protocol-layer intent.

exabgp-service.description: ExaBGP is exercised only as ExaBgpService plus Binding, including the IX speaker example.

looking-glass.description: Looking Glass remains a route-state observer and is tested separately from ExaBGP event streams.

dns-endpoint.description: DNS endpoint behavior is represented by the mini Internet plus DNS example.

legacy-guard.description: Removed legacy control-plane APIs stay removed through explicit guard tests.

control-plane-unit.description: Control-plane API, rendering, service, and legacy guard checks.

control-plane-runtime.description: Docker runtime probes for selected BIRD/FRR, ExaBGP, and Looking Glass examples.
control-plane-runtime.notes: Manual workflow-dispatch entry for this PR. PR3 will make runtime evidence richer and artifact-indexed.

basic-a00-simple-as.description: Small IPv4 default behavior smoke example.

basic-a13-exabgp-control-plane.description: ExaBGP service plus Binding control-plane speaker example.

basic-a14-bgp-event-looking-glass.description: Looking Glass route-state observer plus separate ExaBGP event dashboard example.

internet-b02-mini-internet-with-dns.description: Mini Internet with DNS component and local DNS endpoints.

internet-b30-mini-internet-exabgp-ix.description: Internet-scale ExaBGP IX speaker compile coverage.
